chapter_title.en: The meaning of haqila, muzabana, ‘araya, mukhabarat, mukhadhara, munabadha, mulamasa, the selling of pebble and other things that were declared forbidden

text: ونهى صلى الله عليه وآله عن الارفاء وهي كثرة التدهن.

en.basel-kadem: He, Allah’s blessings be upon him and his Family, also forbade irfa’, and that is much smearing of (liquid) substances (on the body).
